alerts.title: Road Open To: Mile 30 (Teklanika River)
alerts.description: The Denali Park Road is open to Mile 30, Teklanika River. Please stay alert for heavy equipment traveling on the park road.

alerts.title: Park Operations Altered Due to Pretty Rocks Landslide
alerts.description: Summer access to facilities and services in Denali remains altered due to the Pretty Rocks Landslide and the associated closure of the Park Road at Mile 43. Check here for more information on what to expect.
